title: GitHub - developaaah/pgp-manager: A modern, cross-platform desktop UI that makes PGP simple — manage keys, encrypt, sign, and verify, all offline and under your control.
excerpt: A modern, cross-platform desktop UI that makes PGP simple — manage keys, encrypt, sign, and verify, all offline and under your control. - developaaah/pgp-manager
content_html:
A user-friendly approach to PGP.

PGP Manager is a cross-platform OpenPGP desktop application for key management, encryption, decryption, digital signatures, and public key discovery.

Whether you're creating your first OpenPGP key pair or managing multiple existing identities, PGP Manager provides a modern desktop experience without changing the underlying standards.

PGP Manager is not a new encryption system. It is a simpler way to work with the OpenPGP tools and standards that already exist.

Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

Installation

Download the latest release

Download the latest release for your platform from the releases page.

  • macOS — .dmg (Apple Silicon / Intel), drag the app into /Applications
  • Windows — pgpmanager.exe (amd64 / 386)
  • Linux — binary for amd64 / arm64 / 386

Tip

You can also run it as a standalone app, e.g. from a USB drive. Point the storage directory to a folder on your drive when starting the app.

Table of Contents

  • Why PGP Manager?
  • New to OpenPGP?
  • Features
    • Core Features
    • Standalone
    • Clipboard auto-detect
    • System tray
    • Smart decryption and passphrase cache
    • macOS Services
  • Security & Privacy
  • Frequently Asked Questions
  • Local Development

    • Building Binaries
  • Configuration Reference
  • Project Layout
  • Acknowledgements
  • Contributing
  • Releases
  • Support the Project
  • License

Why PGP Manager?

OpenPGP is one of the most widely used standards for encryption and digital signatures.

The cryptography is mature, the ecosystem is well established, and the tooling has been trusted for decades. Yet many common workflows still require multiple applications, command-line tools, or a deep understanding of key management.

PGP Manager was built to remove that friction.

Generate keys, manage identities, search public keyservers, encrypt files, decrypt messages, and verify signatures from a single application while remaining fully compatible with existing OpenPGP standards and workflows.

Whether you're creating your first key pair or already working with GnuPG and public key infrastructure, PGP Manager provides a simpler way to interact with the OpenPGP ecosystem without introducing proprietary formats, cloud services, or vendor lock-in.

New to OpenPGP?

PGP Manager simplifies the workflow, but understanding the basics of public keys, private keys, encryption, and digital signatures will help you get the most out of the application.

Learn the Fundamentals

  • 📖 OpenPGP for Beginners (KDE)
  • 📖 PGP for Beginners
  • 📖 Fundamental Concepts: OpenPGP, GPG & PGP

Understand Public-Key Cryptography

  • 📖 OpenPGP Cryptographic Concepts
  • 📖 How OpenPGP Works

Learn More About OpenPGP

  • 📖 OpenPGP for Application Developers
  • 📖 FSFE OpenPGP Documentation

Once you're comfortable with the basics, PGP Manager provides a straightforward way to perform those tasks without relying on command-line tools.

Features

Core Features

  • Key Management
    Create new OpenPGP identities, import existing key pairs, manage subkeys, and organize multiple identities from a single interface.
  • Encryption & Decryption
    Encrypt text and files for one or multiple recipients and decrypt incoming content without leaving the application.
  • Digital Signatures
    Create signatures for files and messages and verify signatures with clear validation results.
  • Public Key Discovery
    Search public keyservers directly from the application and import matching keys with a single click.
  • Multiple Identities
    Maintain separate identities for personal, professional, and project-specific communication.

Standalone

Keep everything in a single directory and move it wherever you want.

Useful for:

  • USB drives
  • Multiple profiles
  • Isolated environments
  • Temporary workstations

Clipboard auto-detect

While PGP Manager runs in the background, it monitors the clipboard with a lightweight change-counter poll — near-instant detection without continuously reading clipboard contents. What happens on detection is fully configurable in Settings:

Content Action
Encrypted message Opens the window (on your current workspace), fills the text view and starts decryption — when a matching private key exists
Public key Opens the import dialog — for unknown keys only, all keys, or off
Private key Same as public keys, configured separately
Signed message Verified silently in the background — a system notification tells you whether the signature is valid and which key signed

System tray

PGP Manager can live entirely in the system tray (menu bar on macOS). The tray menu is context-sensitive: it shows only the actions that apply to what's currently in your clipboard.

  • Plain text → Encrypt / Sign
  • Encrypted message → Decrypt
  • Signed message → Verify
  • Key block → Import Key

Run in System Tray controls whether the app starts hidden in the tray or as a regular window. Launch at Login adds PGP Manager to your OS login items.

Smart decryption and passphrase cache

The matching private key is identified from the message's PKESK headers instead of trying every key. Unlocked passphrases are kept in memory for a configurable time (default 15 minutes, or never, 1 hour, until quit), so you only type your passphrase once per session.

macOS Services

On macOS, PGP actions are available system-wide through the Services menu. Select text in any application — or files in Finder — right-click, and choose a PGP: entry: Encrypt, Decrypt, Sign, Verify, or Import Key. File actions (Encrypt File, Decrypt File, Sign File, Verify File) work on any file selection in Finder. Results open in the app window; signature checks arrive as a notification.

Security & Privacy

PGP Manager is designed around a simple principle:

Your keys belong to you.

  • Cryptographic operations are performed locally
  • Private keys remain under your control
  • No cloud synchronization
  • No account registration
  • No telemetry
  • No proprietary key formats

Keys are only shared when you explicitly export or publish them.

Notifications never expose decrypted content.

Technical Notes

  • Cryptographic operations are performed using gopenpgp v3
  • Private keys are stored as armored files
  • Passphrases are only stored in memory
  • Existing OpenPGP ecosystems remain fully compatible

Frequently Asked Questions

Getting Started

Do I need GnuPG?

No. PGP Manager works independently but can integrate with existing GnuPG environments where available.

Can I import existing OpenPGP keys?

Yes. Existing keys can be imported, managed, and used directly.

Does PGP Manager work without an internet connection?

Fully. Internet is only required for keyserver operations. Everything else — encryption, decryption, signing, verification, and key generation — works completely offline.

Privacy & Security

Do my keys or messages ever leave my device?

No — unless you explicitly publish a public key to a keyserver. All encryption, decryption, signing, and verification runs locally. Keyserver lookups only transmit the search query (email address or fingerprint).

Where exactly are my keys stored?

In the directory you chose on first launch — by default ~/.pgp. Each private key is an individual .asc file in that directory. You can change the storage location in Settings → Storage.

What happens if I forget my passphrase?

The private key file remains on disk, encrypted with the passphrase. There is no recovery mechanism — if the passphrase is lost, the key cannot be used. Keep a backup of your passphrase in a password manager.

Compatibility & Technical Details

Does PGP Manager use a proprietary format?

No. PGP Manager works with standard OpenPGP formats and remains compatible with existing tools.

Which key types and algorithms are supported?

RSA (2048, 3072, 4096 bit) and Ed25519/Curve25519 for key generation. On import, any OpenPGP-compatible key is accepted. Encryption uses the recipient key's preferred algorithms as declared in the key.

Is PGP Manager compatible with other PGP software?

Yes. It speaks standard OpenPGP (RFC 4880), so messages and keys are interoperable with GPG, Kleopatra, Thunderbird/Enigmail, ProtonMail, and any other RFC 4880-compliant tool.

Local Development

Prerequisites

  • Go 1.26+
  • Node.js with yarn
  • Wails v2 CLI
  • Docker (Linux cross-builds only)
  • Xcode Command Line Tools (macOS only)

Running in Development Mode

make dev      # or `wails dev`

Hot reload is active for both backend and frontend components.

Building Binaries

# macOS
make darwin

# DMG packages
make dmg-arm64
make dmg-amd64

# Windows
make windows

# Linux
make linux

# Complete release matrix
make release VERSION=v1.2.3

Build artifacts are written to bin/.

Configuration Reference

The configuration file is stored as config.toml.

All options are also available through the application's settings interface.

Key Default Meaning
keys_dir "" Directory for key files; empty stores them next to config.toml
passphrase_cache_ttl_minutes 15 Passphrase cache lifetime (0 never, -1 until quit)
theme dark dark, light or system
custom_keyservers [] Additional keyserver URLs
start_in_tray true Start hidden in the system tray
clip_detect_messages true Auto-decrypt detected encrypted messages
clip_detect_public_keys unknown off, unknown (new keys only) or all
clip_detect_private_keys unknown off, unknown or all
clip_detect_signatures true Auto-verify signed messages (notification only)
auto_copy_results true Copy Encrypt/Sign results to the clipboard

Project Layout

app.go                  Wails bindings, action dispatch, clipboard monitor
main.go                 Wails bootstrap (window, tray start mode, single instance)
platform_*.go / *.m     Platform glue: macOS Services/NSStatusItem, tray, autostart
backend/
  autostart/            Launch-at-login (SMAppService / registry / XDG)
  cache/                In-memory passphrase cache
  clipboard/            Cheap clipboard change counters per OS
  config/               TOML config, first-run/standalone handling
  crypto/               Encrypt/decrypt/sign/verify for text + files, keygen, subkeys
  gnupg/                GnuPG home discovery + native keyring read
  install/              System-wide install (move to /Applications, desktop entry)
  keyserver/            HKP/VKS keyserver client
  keystore/             Armored key files on disk
  notification/         System notifications (verification results)
  tray/                 Windows/Linux system tray
frontend/               Svelte + Tailwind UI
build/                  Packaging: DMG script, Docker Linux builders, tray icons

Acknowledgements

  • gopenpgp — OpenPGP implementation
  • Wails — Go ↔ web desktop framework
  • Carbon Design System — UI icons; the tray icon is carbon's ibm--cloud--key-protect (Apache 2.0)
  • fyne.io/systray — Windows/Linux tray
  • The OpenPGP ecosystem and community

Contributing

Bug reports and feature requests are welcome — please open an issue first before submitting a pull request, so we can discuss scope and approach.

Here's the standard flow:

  1. Fork the repository
  2. Clone your fork: git clone https://github.com/developaaah/pgp-manager-test.git
  3. Branch: git checkout -b feature/your-feature
  4. Commit: git commit -m 'feat: add some feature'
  5. Push: git push origin feature/your-feature
  6. Open a pull request

Please follow the existing code style.

Releases

Releases follow Semantic Versioning. Pushing a v* tag to main triggers the automated build pipeline, which produces signed binaries and DMGs for all supported platforms and publishes them to the releases page.

Pre-release builds (v*-beta.*, v*-rc.*) are published as pre-releases and will not trigger update notifications in stable builds.

Support the Project

If PGP Manager saves you time or helps keep your communications secure, consider supporting its development.

☕ Crypto donations

License

PGP Manager is released under the MIT License.

sentences.en: PGP Manager simplifies the workflow, but understanding the basics of public keys, private keys, encryption, and digital signatures will help you get the most out of the application.
sentences.zh: PGP 管理器简化了工作流程，但了解公钥、私钥、加密和数字签名的基础知识将帮助您充分利用该应用程序。
了解有关 OpenPGP 的更多信息
📖 面向应用程序开发人员的 OpenPGP

blocks.html_en: Once you're comfortable with the basics, PGP Manager provides a straightforward way to perform those tasks without relying on command-line tools.

sentences.en: Once you're comfortable with the basics, PGP Manager provides a straightforward way to perform those tasks without relying on command-line tools.
sentences.zh: 一旦您熟悉了基础知识，PGP Manager 就会提供一种直接的方法来执行这些任务，而无需依赖命令行工具。

blocks.html_en:
• Key Management
    Create new OpenPGP identities, import existing key pairs, manage subkeys, and organize multiple identities from a single interface.

sentences.en: Key Management Create new OpenPGP identities, import existing key pairs, manage subkeys, and organize multiple identities from a single interface.
sentences.zh: 密钥管理 创建新的 OpenPGP 身份、导入现有密钥对、管理子密钥以及从单个界面组织多个身份。

blocks.html_en:
• Encryption & Decryption
    Encrypt text and files for one or multiple recipients and decrypt incoming content without leaving the application.

sentences.en: Encryption & Decryption Encrypt text and files for one or multiple recipients and decrypt incoming content without leaving the application.
sentences.zh: 加密和解密 无需离开应用程序即可为一个或多个收件人加密文本和文件并解密传入内容。

blocks.html_en:
• Digital Signatures
    Create signatures for files and messages and verify signatures with clear validation results.

sentences.en: Digital Signatures Create signatures for files and messages and verify signatures with clear validation results.
sentences.zh: 数字签名 为文件和消息创建签名，并通过清晰的验证结果验证签名。

blocks.html_en:
• Public Key Discovery
    Search public keyservers directly from the application and import matching keys with a single click.

sentences.en: Public Key Discovery Search public keyservers directly from the application and import matching keys with a single click.
sentences.zh: 公钥发现直接从应用程序搜索公钥服务器，只需单击一下即可导入匹配的密钥。

blocks.html_en:
• Multiple Identities
    Maintain separate identities for personal, professional, and project-specific communication.

sentences.en: Multiple Identities Maintain separate identities for personal, professional, and project-specific communication.
sentences.zh: 多重身份 为个人、专业和特定于项目的通信维护单独的身份。

blocks.html_en: Keep everything in a single directory and move it wherever you want.

sentences.en: Keep everything in a single directory and move it wherever you want.
sentences.zh: 将所有内容保存在一个目录中并将其移动到任何您想要的位置。

blocks.html_en: While PGP Manager runs in the background, it monitors the clipboard with a lightweight change-counter poll — near-instant detection without continuously reading clipboard contents. What happens on detection is fully configurable in Settings:

sentences.en: While PGP Manager runs in the background, it monitors the clipboard with a lightweight change-counter poll — near-instant detection without continuously reading clipboard contents.
sentences.zh: 当 PGP 管理器在后台运行时，它通过轻量级更改计数器轮询来监视剪贴板 - 近乎即时检测，无需连续读取剪贴板内容。

sentences.en: What happens on detection is fully configurable in Settings:
sentences.zh: 检测时发生的情况可以在“设置”中完全配置：

blocks.html_en: Opens the window (on your current workspace), fills the text view and starts decryption — when a matching private key exists

sentences.en: Opens the window (on your current workspace), fills the text view and starts decryption — when a matching private key exists
sentences.zh: 打开窗口（在您当前的工作空间上），填充文本视图并开始解密 - 当存在匹配的私钥时

blocks.html_en: Opens the import dialog — for unknown keys only, all keys, or off

sentences.en: Opens the import dialog — for unknown keys only, all keys, or off
sentences.zh: 打开导入对话框 — 仅适用于未知键、所有键或关闭

sentences.en: Same as public keys, configured separately

blocks.html_en: Verified silently in the background — a system notification tells you whether the signature is valid and which key signed

sentences.en: Verified silently in the background — a system notification tells you whether the signature is valid and which key signed
sentences.zh: 在后台静默验证 - 系统通知告诉您签名是否有效以及签名的密钥

blocks.html_en: PGP Manager can live entirely in the system tray (menu bar on macOS). The tray menu is context-sensitive: it shows only the actions that apply to what's currently in your clipboard.

sentences.en: PGP Manager can live entirely in the system tray (menu bar on macOS).
sentences.zh: PGP 管理器可以完全位于系统托盘中（macOS 上的菜单栏）。

sentences.en: The tray menu is context-sensitive: it shows only the actions that apply to what's currently in your clipboard.
sentences.zh: 托盘菜单是上下文相关的：它仅显示适用于剪贴板中当前内容的操作。

blocks.html_en: Run in System Tray controls whether the app starts hidden in the tray or as a regular window. Launch at Login adds PGP Manager to your OS login items.

sentences.en: Run in System Tray controls whether the app starts hidden in the tray or as a regular window.
sentences.zh: 在系统托盘中运行控制应用程序是隐藏在托盘中还是作为常规窗口启动。

sentences.en: Launch at Login adds PGP Manager to your OS login items.
sentences.zh: Launch at Login 将 PGP Manager 添加到您的操作系统登录项中。

blocks.html_en: Smart decryption and passphrase cache

The matching private key is identified from the message's PKESK headers instead of trying every key. Unlocked passphrases are kept in memory for a configurable time (default 15 minutes, or never, 1 hour, until quit), so you only type your passphrase once per session.

sentences.en: The matching private key is identified from the message's PKESK headers instead of trying every key.
sentences.zh: 匹配的私钥是从消息的 PKESK 标头中识别的，而不是尝试每个密钥。

sentences.en: Unlocked passphrases are kept in memory for a configurable time (default 15 minutes, or never, 1 hour, until quit), so you only type your passphrase once per session.
sentences.zh: 解锁的密码会在内存中保存一段可配置的时间（默认 15 分钟，或者从不保存，1 小时，直到退出），因此每次会话您只需输入一次密码。

blocks.html_en: On macOS, PGP actions are available system-wide through the Services menu. Select text in any application — or files in Finder — right-click, and choose a PGP: entry: Encrypt, Decrypt, Sign, Verify, or Import Key. File actions (Encrypt File, Decrypt File, Sign File, Verify File) work on any file selection in Finder. Results open in the app window; signature checks arrive as a notification.

sentences.en: On macOS, PGP actions are available system-wide through the Services menu.
sentences.zh: 在 macOS 上，可以通过“服务”菜单在系统范围内使用 PGP 操作。

sentences.en: Select text in any application — or files in Finder — right-click, and choose a PGP: entry: Encrypt, Decrypt, Sign, Verify, or Import Key.
sentences.zh: 选择任何应用程序中的文本 - 或 Finder 中的文件 - 右键单击​​，然后选择 PGP：条目：加密、解密、签名、验证或导入密钥。

sentences.en: File actions (Encrypt File, Decrypt File, Sign File, Verify File) work on any file selection in Finder.
sentences.zh: 文件操作（加密文件、解密文件、签名文件、验证文件）适用于 Finder 中的任何文件选择。

sentences.en: Results open in the app window; signature checks arrive as a notification.
sentences.zh: 结果在应用程序窗口中打开；签名检查作为通知到达。

blocks.html_en: PGP Manager is designed around a simple principle:

sentences.en: PGP Manager is designed around a simple principle:
sentences.zh: PGP 管理器的设计围绕一个简单的原则：

sentences.en: Private keys remain under your control

blocks.html_en: Keys are only shared when you explicitly export or publish them.

sentences.en: Keys are only shared when you explicitly export or publish them.
sentences.zh: 仅当您显式导出或发布密钥时才会共享密钥。
通知永远不会暴露解密的内容。

blocks.html_en: • Cryptographic operations are performed using gopenpgp v3

sentences.en: Cryptographic operations are performed using gopenpgp v3
sentences.zh: 使用 gopenpgp v3 执行加密操作

blocks.html_en: • Private keys are stored as armored files

sentences.en: Private keys are stored as armored files
Passphrases are only stored in memory
Existing OpenPGP ecosystems remain fully compatible
sentences.zh: 现有的 OpenPGP 生态系统保持完全兼容

blocks.html_en: No. PGP Manager works independently but can integrate with existing GnuPG environments where available.

sentences.en: No. PGP Manager works independently but can integrate with existing GnuPG environments where available.
sentences.zh: 不需要。PGP 管理器独立工作，但可以与现有的 GnuPG 环境（如果可用）集成。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Existing keys can be imported, managed, and used directly.

sentences.en: Existing keys can be imported, managed, and used directly.
sentences.zh: 现有密钥可以直接导入、管理和使用。

blocks.html_en: Fully. Internet is only required for keyserver operations. Everything else — encryption, decryption, signing, verification, and key generation — works completely offline.

sentences.en: Internet is only required for keyserver operations.
sentences.zh: 仅密钥服务器操作需要互联网。

sentences.en: Everything else — encryption, decryption, signing, verification, and key generation — works completely offline.
sentences.zh: 其他一切——加密、解密、签名、验证和密钥生成——完全离线工作。

blocks.html_en: No — unless you explicitly publish a public key to a keyserver. All encryption, decryption, signing, and verification runs locally. Keyserver lookups only transmit the search query (email address or fingerprint).

sentences.en: No — unless you explicitly publish a public key to a keyserver.
sentences.zh: 否 - 除非您明确地将公钥发布到密钥服务器。

sentences.en: All encryption, decryption, signing, and verification runs locally.
sentences.zh: 所有加密、解密、签名和验证都在本地运行。

sentences.en: Keyserver lookups only transmit the search query (email address or fingerprint).
sentences.zh: 密钥服务器查找仅传输搜索查询（电子邮件地址或指纹）。

blocks.html_en: In the directory you chose on first launch — by default ~/.pgp. Each private key is an individual .asc file in that directory. You can change the storage location in Settings → Storage.

sentences.en: In the directory you chose on first launch — by default ~/.pgp.
sentences.zh: 在您首次启动时选择的目录中 — 默认为 ~/.pgp。

sentences.en: Each private key is an individual .asc file in that directory.
sentences.zh: 每个私钥都是该目录中的一个单独的 .asc 文件。

sentences.en: You can change the storage location in Settings → Storage.
sentences.zh: 您可以在“设置”→“存储”中更改存储位置。

blocks.html_en: The private key file remains on disk, encrypted with the passphrase. There is no recovery mechanism — if the passphrase is lost, the key cannot be used. Keep a backup of your passphrase in a password manager.

sentences.en: The private key file remains on disk, encrypted with the passphrase.
sentences.zh: 私钥文件保留在磁盘上，并使用密码进行加密。

sentences.en: There is no recovery mechanism — if the passphrase is lost, the key cannot be used.
sentences.zh: 没有恢复机制——如果密码丢失，密钥将无法使用。

sentences.en: Keep a backup of your passphrase in a password manager.
sentences.zh: 在密码管理器中保存密码短语的备份。

blocks.html_en: No. PGP Manager works with standard OpenPGP formats and remains compatible with existing tools.

sentences.en: No. PGP Manager works with standard OpenPGP formats and remains compatible with existing tools.
sentences.zh: 不会。PGP Manager 可与标准 OpenPGP 格式配合使用，并与现有工具保持兼容。

blocks.html_en: RSA (2048, 3072, 4096 bit) and Ed25519/Curve25519 for key generation. On import, any OpenPGP-compatible key is accepted. Encryption uses the recipient key's preferred algorithms as declared in the key.

sentences.en: RSA (2048, 3072, 4096 bit) and Ed25519/Curve25519 for key generation.
On import, any OpenPGP-compatible key is accepted.
sentences.zh: 导入时，任何与 OpenPGP 兼容的密钥都会被接受。

sentences.en: Encryption uses the recipient key's preferred algorithms as declared in the key.
sentences.zh: 加密使用密钥中声明的接收者密钥的首选算法。

blocks.html_en: Yes. It speaks standard OpenPGP (RFC 4880), so messages and keys are interoperable with GPG, Kleopatra, Thunderbird/Enigmail, ProtonMail, and any other RFC 4880-compliant tool.

sentences.en: It speaks standard OpenPGP (RFC 4880), so messages and keys are interoperable with GPG, Kleopatra, Thunderbird/Enigmail, ProtonMail, and any other RFC 4880-compliant tool.
sentences.zh: 它采用标准 OpenPGP (RFC 4880)，因此消息和密钥可与 GPG、Kleopatra、Thunderbird/Enigmail、ProtonMail 和任何其他符合 RFC 4880 的工具互操作。
Docker（仅限 Linux 交叉构建）
Xcode 命令行工具（仅限 macOS）

blocks.html_en: Hot reload is active for both backend and frontend components.

sentences.en: Hot reload is active for both backend and frontend components.
sentences.zh: 热重载对于后端和前端组件均有效。

sentences.en: Build artifacts are written to bin/.

blocks.html_en: The configuration file is stored as config.toml.

sentences.en: The configuration file is stored as config.toml.

blocks.html_en: All options are also available through the application's settings interface.

sentences.en: All options are also available through the application's settings interface.
sentences.zh: 所有选项也可通过应用程序的设置界面使用。

blocks.html_en: Directory for key files; empty stores them next to config.toml

sentences.en: Directory for key files; empty stores them next to config.toml
sentences.zh: 关键文件目录；空将它们存储在 config.toml 旁边

sentences.en: Passphrase cache lifetime (0 never, -1 until quit)
sentences.zh: 密码短语缓存生命周期（0 从不，-1 直到退出）

sentences.en: Start hidden in the system tray
sentences.zh: 启动隐藏在系统托盘中
自动解密检测到的加密消息

sentences.en: off, unknown (new keys only) or all
sentences.zh: 关闭、未知（仅限新钥匙）或全部
自动验证签名消息（仅限通知）

sentences.en: Copy Encrypt/Sign results to the clipboard
sentences.zh: 将加密/签名结果复制到剪贴板

blocks.html_en: • Wails — Go ↔ web desktop framework

sentences.zh: Wails — Go ↔ Web 桌面框架

blocks.html_en: • Carbon Design System — UI icons; the tray icon is carbon's ibm--cloud--key-protect (Apache 2.0)

sentences.en: Carbon Design System — UI icons; the tray icon is carbon's ibm--cloud--key-protect (Apache 2.0)
sentences.zh: Carbon 设计系统 — UI 图标；托盘图标是carbon的ibm--cloud--key-protect (Apache 2.0)

blocks.html_en: Bug reports and feature requests are welcome — please open an issue first before submitting a pull request, so we can discuss scope and approach.

sentences.en: Bug reports and feature requests are welcome — please open an issue first before submitting a pull request, so we can discuss scope and approach.
sentences.zh: 欢迎错误报告和功能请求 - 请在提交拉取请求之前先提出问题，以便我们可以讨论范围和方法。
克隆你的分支： git clone https://github.com/developaaah/pgp-manager-test.git

sentences.en: Commit: git commit -m 'feat: add some feature'
sentences.zh: 提交： git commit -m 'feat：添加一些功能'
推送： git push origin feature/your-feature

blocks.html_en: Please follow the existing code style.

sentences.en: Please follow the existing code style.
sentences.zh: 请遵循现有的代码风格。

blocks.html_en: Releases follow Semantic Versioning. Pushing a v* tag to main triggers the automated build pipeline, which produces signed binaries and DMGs for all supported platforms and publishes them to the releases page.

sentences.zh: 版本遵循语义版本控制。

sentences.en: Pushing a v* tag to main triggers the automated build pipeline, which produces signed binaries and DMGs for all supported platforms and publishes them to the releases page.
sentences.zh: 将 v* 标签推送到 main 会触发自动构建管道，该管道为所有支持的平台生成签名的二进制文件和 DMG，并将它们发布到发布页面。

blocks.html_en: Pre-release builds (v*-beta.*, v*-rc.*) are published as pre-releases and will not trigger update notifications in stable builds.

sentences.en: Pre-release builds (v*-beta.*, v*-rc.*) are published as pre-releases and will not trigger update notifications in stable builds.
sentences.zh: 预发布版本（v*-beta.*、v*-rc.*）作为预版本发布，不会在稳定版本中触发更新通知。

blocks.html_en: If PGP Manager saves you time or helps keep your communications secure, consider supporting its development.

sentences.en: If PGP Manager saves you time or helps keep your communications secure, consider supporting its development.
sentences.zh: 如果 PGP Manager 可以节省您的时间或有助于确保通信安全，请考虑支持其开发。

blocks.html_en: PGP Manager is released under the MIT License.

sentences.en: PGP Manager is released under the MIT License.
sentences.zh: PGP Manager 在 MIT 许可证下发布。

content_html_zh:
一种用户友好的 PGP 方法。

PGP Manager 是一个跨平台 OpenPGP 桌面应用程序，用于密钥管理、加密、解密、数字签名和公钥发现。

无论您是创建第一个 OpenPGP 密钥对还是管理多个现有身份，PGP Manager 都可以提供现代桌面体验，而无需更改底层标准。

PGP Manager 并不是一个新的加密系统。 这是使用现有 OpenPGP 工具和标准的更简单方法。

适用于 macOS、Windows 和 Linux。

安装

下载最新版本

从版本页面下载适合您平台的最新版本。

  • macOS — .dmg (Apple Silicon / Intel)，将应用程序拖入 /Applications
  • Windows - pgpmanager.exe (amd64 / 386)
  • Linux — amd64 / arm64 / 386 的二进制文件

Tip

您还可以将其作为独立应用程序运行，例如从 USB 驱动器。 启动应用程序时，将存储目录指向驱动器上的文件夹。

目录

  • 为什么选择 PGP 管理器？
  • OpenPGP 新手？
  • 功能 核心功能 独立剪贴板自动检测 系统托盘 智能解密和密码缓存 macOS 服务
  • 安全与隐私
  • 常见问题解答
  • 本地开发先决条件 在开发模式下运行构建二进制文件
  • 配置参考
  • 项目布局
  • 致谢
  • 贡献
  • 发布
  • 支持项目
  • 执照

为什么选择 PGP 管理器？

OpenPGP 是最广泛使用的加密和数字签名标准之一。

密码学已经成熟，生态系统也很完善，并且工具几十年来一直受到信赖。 然而，许多常见的工作流程仍然需要多个应用程序、命令行工具或对密钥管理的深入了解。

PGP Manager 的构建就是为了消除这种摩擦。

生成密钥、管理身份、搜索公钥服务器、加密文件、解密消息以及验证来自单个应用程序的签名，同时保持与现有 OpenPGP 标准和工作流程完全兼容。

无论您是在创建第一个密钥对，还是已经在使用 GnuPG 和公钥基础设施，PGP Manager 都提供了一种与 OpenPGP 生态系统交互的更简单方法，而无需引入专有格式、云服务或供应商锁定。

OpenPGP 新手？

PGP 管理器简化了工作流程，但了解公钥、私钥、加密和数字签名的基础知识将帮助您充分利用该应用程序。

学习基础知识

  • 📖 OpenPGP 初学者 (KDE)
  • 📖 PGP 初学者
  • 📖 基本概念：OpenPGP、GPG 和 PGP

了解公钥密码学

  • 📖 OpenPGP 加密概念
  • 📖 OpenPGP 的工作原理

了解有关 OpenPGP 的更多信息

  • 📖 面向应用程序开发人员的 OpenPGP
  • 📖 FSFE OpenPGP 文档

一旦您熟悉了基础知识，PGP Manager 就会提供一种直接的方法来执行这些任务，而无需依赖命令行工具。

特征

核心特点

  • 密钥管理 创建新的 OpenPGP 身份、导入现有密钥对、管理子密钥以及从单个界面组织多个身份。
  • 加密和解密 无需离开应用程序即可为一个或多个收件人加密文本和文件并解密传入内容。
  • 数字签名 为文件和消息创建签名，并通过清晰的验证结果验证签名。
  • 公钥发现直接从应用程序搜索公钥服务器，只需单击一下即可导入匹配的密钥。
  • 多重身份 为个人、专业和特定于项目的通信维护单独的身份。

独立式

将所有内容保存在一个目录中并将其移动到任何您想要的位置。

适用于：

  • USB 驱动器
  • 多个配置文件
  • 隔离环境
  • 临时工作站

自动检测剪贴板

当 PGP 管理器在后台运行时，它通过轻量级更改计数器轮询来监视剪贴板 - 近乎即时检测，无需连续读取剪贴板内容。 检测时发生的情况可以在“设置”中完全配置：

内容 行动
加密消息 打开窗口（在您当前的工作空间上），填充文本视图并开始解密 - 当存在匹配的私钥时
公钥 打开导入对话框 — 仅适用于未知键、所有键或关闭
私钥 与公钥相同，单独配置
签名消息 在后台静默验证 - 系统通知告诉您签名是否有效以及签名的密钥

系统托盘

PGP 管理器可以完全位于系统托盘中（macOS 上的菜单栏）。 托盘菜单是上下文相关的：它仅显示适用于剪贴板中当前内容的操作。

  • 纯文本 → 加密/签名
  • 加密消息 → 解密
  • 签名消息 → 验证
  • 密钥块 → 导入密钥

在系统托盘中运行控制应用程序是隐藏在托盘中还是作为常规窗口启动。 Launch at Login 将 PGP Manager 添加到您的操作系统登录项中。

智能解密和密码缓存

匹配的私钥是从消息的 PKESK 标头中识别的，而不是尝试每个密钥。 解锁的密码会在内存中保存一段可配置的时间（默认 15 分钟，或者从不保存，1 小时，直到退出），因此每次会话您只需输入一次密码。

macOS 服务

在 macOS 上，可以通过“服务”菜单在系统范围内使用 PGP 操作。 选择任何应用程序中的文本 - 或 Finder 中的文件 - 右键单击​​，然后选择 PGP：条目：加密、解密、签名、验证或导入密钥。 文件操作（加密文件、解密文件、签名文件、验证文件）适用于 Finder 中的任何文件选择。 结果在应用程序窗口中打开；签名检查作为通知到达。

安全与隐私

PGP 管理器的设计围绕一个简单的原则：

你的钥匙属于你。

  • 加密操作在本地执行
  • 私钥仍由您控制
  • 无云同步
  • 没有账号注册
  • 无遥测
  • 无专有密钥格式

仅当您显式导出或发布密钥时才会共享密钥。

通知永远不会暴露解密的内容。

技术说明

  • 使用 gopenpgp v3 执行加密操作
  • 私钥存储为装甲文件
  • 密码仅存储在内存中
  • 现有的 OpenPGP 生态系统保持完全兼容

常见问题解答

入门

Do I need GnuPG?

不需要。PGP 管理器独立工作，但可以与现有的 GnuPG 环境（如果可用）集成。

Can I import existing OpenPGP keys?

是的。 现有密钥可以直接导入、管理和使用。

Does PGP Manager work without an internet connection?

完全。 仅密钥服务器操作需要互联网。 其他一切——加密、解密、签名、验证和密钥生成——完全离线工作。

隐私与安全

Do my keys or messages ever leave my device?

否 - 除非您明确地将公钥发布到密钥服务器。 所有加密、解密、签名和验证都在本地运行。 密钥服务器查找仅传输搜索查询（电子邮件地址或指纹）。

Where exactly are my keys stored?

在您首次启动时选择的目录中 — 默认为 ~/.pgp。 每个私钥都是该目录中的一个单独的 .asc 文件。 您可以在“设置”→“存储”中更改存储位置。

What happens if I forget my passphrase?

私钥文件保留在磁盘上，并使用密码进行加密。 没有恢复机制——如果密码丢失，密钥将无法使用。 在密码管理器中保存密码短语的备份。

兼容性和技术细节

Does PGP Manager use a proprietary format?

不会。PGP Manager 可与标准 OpenPGP 格式配合使用，并与现有工具保持兼容。

Which key types and algorithms are supported?

RSA（2048、3072、4096 位）和 Ed25519/Curve25519 用于密钥生成。 导入时，任何与 OpenPGP 兼容的密钥都会被接受。 加密使用密钥中声明的接收者密钥的首选算法。

Is PGP Manager compatible with other PGP software?

是的。 它采用标准 OpenPGP (RFC 4880)，因此消息和密钥可与 GPG、Kleopatra、Thunderbird/Enigmail、ProtonMail 和任何其他符合 RFC 4880 的工具互操作。

本地发展

先决条件

  • Go 1.26+
  • Node.js 与纱线
  • Wails v2 CLI
  • Docker（仅限 Linux 交叉构建）
  • Xcode 命令行工具（仅限 macOS）

在开发模式下运行

make dev      # or `wails dev`

热重载对于后端和前端组件均有效。

构建二进制文件

# macOS
make darwin

# DMG packages
make dmg-arm64
make dmg-amd64

# Windows
make windows

# Linux
make linux

# Complete release matrix
make release VERSION=v1.2.3

构建工件被写入 bin/。

配置参考

配置文件存储为config.toml。

所有选项也可通过应用程序的设置界面使用。

Key 默认 意义
键目录 "" 关键文件目录；空将它们存储在 config.toml 旁边
passphrase_cache_ttl_分钟 15 密码短语缓存生命周期（0 从不，-1 直到退出）
theme dark 黑暗、光明或系统
自定义密钥服务器 [] 其他密钥服务器 URL
托盘开始 true 启动隐藏在系统托盘中
剪辑检测消息 true 自动解密检测到的加密消息
剪辑检测公共密钥 未知 关闭、未知（仅限新钥匙）或全部
Clip_Detect_private_keys 未知 关闭、未知或全部
剪辑检测签名 true 自动验证签名消息（仅限通知）
自动复制结果 true 将加密/签名结果复制到剪贴板

项目布局

app.go                  Wails bindings, action dispatch, clipboard monitor
main.go                 Wails bootstrap (window, tray start mode, single instance)
platform_*.go / *.m     Platform glue: macOS Services/NSStatusItem, tray, autostart
backend/
  autostart/            Launch-at-login (SMAppService / registry / XDG)
  cache/                In-memory passphrase cache
  clipboard/            Cheap clipboard change counters per OS
  config/               TOML config, first-run/standalone handling
  crypto/               Encrypt/decrypt/sign/verify for text + files, keygen, subkeys
  gnupg/                GnuPG home discovery + native keyring read
  install/              System-wide install (move to /Applications, desktop entry)
  keyserver/            HKP/VKS keyserver client
  keystore/             Armored key files on disk
  notification/         System notifications (verification results)
  tray/                 Windows/Linux system tray
frontend/               Svelte + Tailwind UI
build/                  Packaging: DMG script, Docker Linux builders, tray icons

致谢

  • gopenpgp — OpenPGP 实现
  • Wails — Go ↔ Web 桌面框架
  • Carbon 设计系统 — UI 图标；托盘图标是carbon的ibm--cloud--key-protect (Apache 2.0)
  • fyne.io/systray — Windows/Linux 托盘
  • OpenPGP 生态系统和社区

贡献

欢迎错误报告和功能请求 - 请在提交拉取请求之前先提出问题，以便我们可以讨论范围和方法。

这是标准流程：

  1. 分叉存储库
  2. 克隆你的分支： git clone https://github.com/developaaah/pgp-manager-test.git
  3. 分支： git checkout -b feature/your-feature
  4. 提交： git commit -m 'feat：添加一些功能'
  5. 推送： git push origin feature/your-feature
  6. 打开拉取请求

请遵循现有的代码风格。

发布

版本遵循语义版本控制。 将 v* 标签推送到 main 会触发自动构建管道，该管道为所有支持的平台生成签名的二进制文件和 DMG，并将它们发布到发布页面。

预发布版本（v*-beta.*、v*-rc.*）作为预版本发布，不会在稳定版本中触发更新通知。

支持项目

如果 PGP Manager 可以节省您的时间或有助于确保通信安全，请考虑支持其开发。
